sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '3GIA000071' and not ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '3GIA000071' and GL = '6911000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL,Contract,ProdCode,CC, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, GL,Contract,ProdCode,CC, Crcy, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL,Contract,ProdCode,CC, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-save' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,Crcy,'3GIA000071' as CC,'3GIA000070' as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', PK = NULL, Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt2, Amt3 = -Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,Crcy,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, GL,'3270' as Co,Crcy, CC, Contract, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,GL,Crcy,CC,Contract,ProdCode )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,Crcy,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '6911000' as GL,'3270' as Co,Crcy,'3GIA000011' as CC, Contract, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1)*0.05,2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2)*0.05,2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3)*0.05,2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Crcy,Contract,ProdCode )

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Co,TP,PC,CC,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, Crcy,Co,'2008' as TP,'3990000000' as PC,'' as CC, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,GL,PC,CC, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID,'2008' as Co,'3270' as TP, '2899901' as GL,'1400000000' as PC,CC, Crcy, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt2,  round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,GL,PC,CC, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID,'2008' as Co,'F0018' as TP, '1998900' as GL,'1400000000' as PC,CC, Crcy, Amt1, Amt3 as Amt2,  Amt3, PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL,Co,TP,Contract,ProdCode,PC,CC, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, GL,Co,TP,Contract,ProdCode,PC,CC, Crcy, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL,Co,TP,Contract,ProdCode,PC,CC, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, GL,Co,TP,Contract,ProdCode,PC,CC, Crcy, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'Recharge NEVAG to Hamblin Watsa for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
